title: Crispy Spicy Peruvian Oat Soup
description: A vibrant, low‑calorie Peruvian soup that balances the heartiness of oats with a fiery kick and a crunchy corn chip topping.
instructions: In a medium pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced sweet potato, red bell pepper, and carrot; sauté for 5 minutes until slightly softened.
Stir in the ground cumin, smoked paprika, and sriracha; cook for 1 minute to toast the spices.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a gentle boil.
Add the rolled oats and let the soup simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the oats are tender.
Fold in the chopped kale and simmer for an additional 2 minutes until the greens are wilted.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Serve hot, topped with a handful of freshly crushed roasted corn chips for crunch, a squeeze of lime, and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
Enjoy the warming, spicy flavors with a satisfying crispy finish.
